detail: The frozen EOD primary now has a concrete carried-inventory ledger with explicit same-day new-lot separation.
Use the existing precedence families to prevent intraday sells from consuming same-day open/add lots or double-consuming against EOD reduce/close.
The justified next step is now an isolated sell-side shadow lane wired to the holdings ledger and precedence policy.
Keep the lane sell-side only; do not pull reentry execution or full replay binding into this buildout.
